seo.title: GEDUI | Complete Educational Platform & Learning Management
seo.description: GEDUI is a complete educational platform for schools, companies and courses. Smart management, innovation, technology and integrated learning.

hero.title: All-in-one Education Platform
hero.paragraph1: We transform education with innovative solutions through knowledge and information.
hero.paragraph2: Our educational ecosystem boosts individual performance for students and employees and supports managers and teachers.

whoWeAre.heading: Who we are
whoWeAre.text: We are a team passionate about education and innovation, using technology to break traditional learning barriers and positively impact personal, academic, and professional development.

whatWeDo.heading: What we do
whatWeDo.text: We contribute to social transformation through education, preparing people for future challenges and opportunities. We empower learners with solutions that make learning more dynamic, efficient, and inclusive.

notebook.title: The innovative tools in our educational ecosystem are versatile and adaptable, helping transform learning across different sectors.

cards.text: Private and public schools, early childhood, elementary, high school, technical education, and universities.
Extracurricular, open courses or specialization programs, mentoring, and franchise networks.
Industries, service providers, companies, call centers, HR consulting, and franchise networks.

items.texto: GEDUI is an excellent platform for students, providing strong support for studies and activities. During the pandemic, it became a priority tool for student access and communication with parents. The platform helps me save time on teachers’ records, report cards, meeting minutes, and assignment verification, contributing to efficient time and resource management.

formacao: Bachelor’s Degree in Languages and Pedagogy
items.texto: Gedui is an incredible facilitator for my work as a teacher. Easy access to tools, an available digital diary, and efficiency in duplicating content. During the pandemic, it provided students with full access to activities and allowed parents to monitor classes in real time. I am grateful to the Gedui team for their constant support and for making our educational practice easier.

After years searching for the ideal school management software, I found GEDUI to be a surprising system. Its performance, practicality, and reach are remarkable. The platform is lightweight, network-accessible, and efficiently meets the daily needs of education professionals. Finding this solution was a milestone in optimizing my educational practice and school management.

formacao: Curso Direto, Open University of Brazil
items.texto: The ecosystem offers incredible tools, providing a direct and efficient connection between students, teachers, families, and the school. With easy handling, it optimizes daily tasks such as grading in a clear and reliable way. The security and peace of mind it offers make all the difference, making it my preferred choice due to the benefits provided.
Gedui’s interface is very easy and intuitive to use, greatly supporting administrative work and making management tasks much simpler and more objective.
